panels.title: fix(onboarding): shrink welcome demo image so it fits without scrolling
panels.scene: A villager glued to a giant demo phone, scrolling endlessly through an onboarding screen. The knight calmly adjusts the image size with two fingers. The villager explodes with joy.

bubbles.speaker: Villager
bubbles.text: It... it fits! I can see the whole image!

panels.title: feat(onboarding): add /onboarding-in variant for India paid (₹349/mo, 1 credit)
panels.scene: The knight presents a new golden signpost pointing towards '/onboarding-in'. Villagers are bowing down to it, throwing rupees in the air. One villager is on the ground trying to calculate if he can afford it.

bubbles.speaker: Villager
bubbles.text: A new path! And it only costs 349 rupees a month!

bubbles.speaker: Other villager
bubbles.text: Is that one credit worth it?

panels.title: chore: trigger redeploy to pick up DODO_SUBSCRIPTION_PRODUCT_ID_IN env var
panels.scene: A giant lever labeled 'REDEPLOY' is pulled by the knight. The entire kingdom shakes as the village upgrades from dirt road to cobblestone, and some villagers cry. A small bird labeled 'DODO' flies away, unharmed.

bubbles.speaker: Villager
bubbles.text: The Great Redeployment! Our lives have been changed!

panels.title: 18 commits. 4 onboarding features. 3 onboarding fixes. 1 DODO.
panels.scene: Knight sitting exhausted in a wooden chair, holding a cup of tea. Villagers are erecting a monument made of old onboarding screens. One villager is naming his baby 'Dodo'.

bubbles.speaker: Villager
bubbles.text: We shall never forget the onboarding era!
